"'''Battle in the Streets!'''" was a web enhancement published at [[Wizards.com]] on [[November 20]], [[2000]] for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', to be used with the [[Star Wars: Invasion of Theed Adventure Game|''Invasion of Theed'']] adventure game.

{{Game-stub}}

==Plot summary==
During the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], a group of heroes help two [[Royal Naboo Security Forces|Royal Naboo Security Force]] guards protect civilians in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] from a group of [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] led by a [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droid]].
